ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the package */,
  "license" TEXT /* The license under which the package is distributed */,
  "author" TEXT /* The author(s) of the package */,
  "maintainer" TEXT /* The maintainer(s) of the package */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* The URL where the package is hosted */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the package was last updated */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* The number of downloads the package has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that depends on another package */,
  "parent_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent package being depended on */,
  "heaviness" INTEGER /* Heaviness of the dependency (PhosR) */,
  "required_version" TEXT /* The specific version of the parent package required by the dependent package */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* The type of dependency (e.g., import, link, suggest) */,
  "imported_functions" TEXT /* A JSON array of functions imported from the parent package */,
  "imported_classes" TEXT /* A JSON array of classes imported from the parent package */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* The date when the dependency was last checked for updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_parent_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency that the import belongs to */,
  "num_imports" INTEGER /* Number of imports */,
  "imported_functions" TEXT /* A JSON array of functions imported */,
  "imported_classes" TEXT /* A JSON array of classes imported */,
  "imported_data" TEXT /* A JSON array of data objects imported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imports_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency that the method belongs to */,
  "num_methods" INTEGER /* Number of methods */,
  "method_names" TEXT /* A JSON array of method names */,
  "method_signatures" TEXT /* A JSON array of method signatures */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency that the class belongs to */,
  "num_classes" INTEGER /* Number of classes */,
  "class_names" TEXT /* A JSON array of class names */,
  "class_methods" TEXT /* A JSON array of methods associated with each class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "required_packages" (
  "required_package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each required package */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency that the required package belongs to */,
  "num_required_packages" INTEGER /* Number of required packages */,
  "required_versions" TEXT /* A JSON array of required versions for each required package */,
  "required_packages_names" TEXT /* A JSON array of names of required packages */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("required_package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_required_packages_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being analyzed */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* The type of analysis performed (e.g., dependency analysis, performance analysis) */,
  "analysis_results" TEXT /* A JSON object containing the results of the analysis */,
  "analysis_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the analysis in seconds */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* The status of the analysis (e.g., completed, failed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id")
)
